claim_guardrail: Do not report query 35 as completed CFM-ID ranking until all 233 candidate spectra are predicted and cfm-id-precomputed ranks the full candidate set.
observed_runtime: Initial 30-minute expansion reached 64/233 predicted spectra. Chunked resume then advanced query 35 to 88/233 predicted spectra; 145 remain missing. Ranking is still skipped until all candidate spectra are available.
purpose: Record attempted expansion of the complete-query native CFM-ID CASMI subset beyond the completed query 16 result.
